lab.c12equilibriumacidbase_observe_the_p: pH curve ka mushahida karein. Graph par half-equivalence point par weak acid ka pKa ka andaza lagayein.
lab.c12industrymaterials_requires_heatin: limestone (CaCO₃) aur clay ko rotary kiln mein 1450°C tak garam karne ki zaroorat hoti hai. Intense heat calcination aur fusion ka sabab banti hai, jo solid clinker nodules (mostly tricalcium silicate) banate hain.
lab.c12industrymaterials_breaks_down_lar: bade aur low-value hydrocarbon molecules ko chhote aur high-value products (jaise gasoline components) mein tod deta hai, heat aur zeolite catalyst ka istemal karke.
lab.c12industrymaterials_relies_heavily_: stable emulsions banane par bohat zyada inhemisar hai. Emulsifiers (surfactants) oil aur water ke darmiyan surface tension ko kam karte hain, stable micelles banate hain jo phase separation ko rokte hain.
lab.c12industrymaterials_compute_the_ind: Plant simulator ke operational data se industrial yields aur rates calculate karein.
lab.c12industrymaterials_what_is_the_exa: , exact clinker yield (%) kya hai bilkul
lab.c12industrymaterials_at_what_exact_t: , kis exact time (seconds mein) par emulsion stability tak pohanchti hai
lab.c12medicine_serine_residue_acetylate: Serine residue acetylated ho gaya! Pathway block ho gaya.
lab.c12medicine_pt_nh_cl_is_a_chemothera: [Pt(NH₃)₂Cl₂] ek chemotherapy medication hai. Yeh tumor cells mein DNA ko cross-link karta hai, primarily guanine bases par. Yeh DNA replication aur transcription mein khalal dalta hai, akhir mein apoptosis ki taraf le jata hai.
lab.c12medicine_acetylsalicylic_acid_irr: (acetylsalicylic acid) Cyclooxygenase (COX) enzymes ko irreversibly inhibit karta hai. Yeh apna acetyl group serine residue mein active site par transfer karta hai, arachidonic acid ko block karta hai aur prostaglandin synthesis rokta hai.
lab.c12medicine_contains_a_beta_lactam_r: ek beta-lactam ring rakhta hai jo transpeptidase enzyme (PBP) se bind hota hai aur competitively inhibit karta hai. Yeh bacterial cell walls mein peptidoglycan ke cross-linking ko rokta hai, osmotic lysis ka sabab banta hai.
lab.c12medicine_use_the_simulation_data_: Simulation data istemal karke pharmacological parameters calculate karein. Farz karein ke relationship is model mein zero-order kinetics ko follow karti hai:
lab.c12medicine_dosage_what_will_be_the_: dosage par, DNA crosslinking ka percentage kya hoga bilkul
lab.c12medicine_calculate_the_constant_r: Inhibition ki constant rate (%/s) calculate karein jab dosage set hai
lab.c12medicine_at_what_exact_time_in_se: Kis exact time (seconds mein) par cell wall integrity giregi
lab.c12organicsynthesis_azo_dyes_are_man: Azo dyes do-step process ke zariye manufacture kiye jate hain:
lab.c12organicsynthesis_first_a_primary_: . Pehle, ek primary aromatic amine (maslan Aniline) ko nitrous acid (NaNO2 + HCl) ke saath thande temperature (0-5°C) par react kiya jata hai taake diazonium salt bane. Agar temperature 10°C se zyada ho jaye, to unstable diazonium salt decomposes ho kar phenol bana leta hai, nitrogen gas chorta hai. Phir phenol jaise 2-Naphthol ke saath coupling se brightly colored Azo Dye banta hai.
lab.c12organicsynthesis_thalidomide_poss: Thalidomide mein ek chiral center hota hai, jo (R) aur (S) enantiomers ki shakal mein maujood hai. Tareekhi taur par, isay racemic mixture ke taur par diya gaya, jiski wajah se (S)-isomer ki taraf se tragic teratogenic effects hue, jabke (R)-isomer therapeutic tha. Modern asymmetric synthesis chiral catalysts ka istemal karti hai taake ek single desired enantiomer bane, jo
lab.c12organicsynthesis_1_what_is_the_ma: 1. Maximum safe temperature (°C) kya hai jo diazonium intermediate decomposes honey se pehle maintain ho sakta hai?
lab.c12organicsynthesis_2_in_an_asymmetr: 2. Asymmetric synthesis mein, aapko 90% (S)-Thalidomide aur 10% (R)-Thalidomide ka mixture milta hai. Enantiomeric Excess (% ee) calculate karein.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_identi: Functional groups ki pehchaan karta hai. O-H bonds ~3300 cm⁻¹ par ek broad peak dikhati hain. C=O bonds ~1715 cm⁻¹ par ek sharp, strong peak dikhati hain. C-H bonds ~2900 cm⁻¹ par sharp peaks dikhati hain.

Hydrogen environments ki pehchaan karta hai. Splitting (n+1 rule) neighboring protons ko indicate karta hai. Chemical shift (ppm) shielding ko indicate karta hai (maslan, closer to O is more deshielded/higher ppm).
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_determ: Molecular weight (M+ peak) aur structure ko fragmentation ke zariye determine karta hai. Base peak (tallest) sab se stable fragment ion ko represent karta hai.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_separa: Compounds ko polarity ke mutabiq alag karta hai. Polar stationary phase (silica) polar compounds ko hold karta hai. Zyada polar solvent use karne se sab compounds ka Rf (Retention factor) barh jata hai.
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_1_base: 1. IR ke broad peak 3300 cm⁻¹ aur MS ke base peak m/z=31 ke mutabiq, Sample A ki shanakht karein. (Ethanol ya Acetone?)
lab.c12spectroscopychromatography_2_for_: 2. Sample B ke liye, 1H NMR ek single peak (singlet) dikhata hai. Iske Mass Spectrum mein base peak ki m/z value kya hai?
lab.c12transitionmetals_form_complex_ion: ligands ke saath complex ions banate hain. Ligands central metal ion ke d-orbitals ko different energy levels mein split kar dete hain (maslan, e_g aur t_2g octahedral fields mein).
lab.c12transitionmetals_the_energy_gap_b: Split d-orbitals ke darmiyan energy gap (Δ) absorbed light ki wavelength ke mutabiq hota hai:
lab.c12transitionmetals_ligands_split_d_: Ligands d-orbitals ko different amounts mein split karte hain:
lab.c12transitionmetals_i_lt_cl_lt_f_lt_: I⁻ < Cl⁻ < F⁻ < OH⁻ < H₂O < NH₃ < CN⁻ < CO
lab.c12transitionmetals_transition_metal: Transition metals ache catalysts hote hain kyunki unke variable oxidation states hote hain aur surface par reactants ko adsorb kar sakte hain.
lab.c12transitionmetals_calculate_the_cr: Crystal field splitting energy (Δ) calculate karein
lab.c6coordinateexp_relocate_the_rocket_: Rocket sprite ko Cartesian plane stage par different coordinates par relocate karein.
lab.c6costumechange_press_the_c_key_on_y: Apne keyboard par 'c' key daba kar event trigger karein aur Rocket ka costume badle.
lab.c6cyberscout_search_the_internet_sim: Internet simulator mein search karein ke Cyber Scout kaise bane aur program mein shamil ho.
lab.c6cyberscout_a_cyber_scout_is_a_resp: Cyber Scout ek zimmedar digital citizen hota hai jo online safety ko promote karta hai, ethical computing practice karta hai, aur apni community ko cyber threats se bachane mein madad karta hai. Aaj hi digital safety ke 5 principles seekhein aur pledge lein.
lab.c6cyberscout_understand_basic_intern: Basic internet safety aur privacy ko samjhe.
lab.c6cyberscout_commit_to_reporting_cyb: Cyberbullying report karne ka wada karein.
lab.c6cyberscout_respect_copyright_and_a: Copyright ka ehtram karein aur plagiarism se bachein.
lab.c6cyberscout_take_the_pledge_join_no: Pledge Lein aur Abhi Shamil Hon
lab.c6cyberscout_you_have_successfully_e: Aap ne kamyabi se process explore kiya aur Cyber Scout ke taur par register ho gaye hain.
lab.c6dietexercise_investigate_the_relat: Calories consumed aur calories burned ke darmiyan relationship ka pata lagayein.
lab.c6dietexercise_the_human_body_follow: Insani jism law of conservation of energy ko follow karta hai. Agar energy consumed (calories from food) energy expended (basal metabolic rate + physical activity) se zyada hai, to extra energy fat ki shakal mein store ho jati hai. Agar expended energy zyada hai, to jism stored fat ko jala kar compensate karta hai.
lab.c6ethicschart_drag_rules_from_the_ba: Rule bank se classroom chart canvas par drag karein taake ek custom ethics poster bana sakein.
lab.c6ethicschart_drag_rules_here_to_bui: Chart banane ke liye rules yahan drag karein
lab.c6ethicschart_chart_is_looking_great: Chart bahut achha lag raha hai! Lab mein display karne ke liye kaafi rules cover ho gaye hain.
lab.c6filemanagement1_create_a_folder_in: Drive D: mein apne roll number ke naam se ek folder banaye (maslan, 'Roll 42').
lab.c6filemanagement1_open_it_and_create: Ise kholen aur 'homework' naam ka sub-folder banaye.

lab.c6filemanagement1_all_tasks_complete: Saare kaam kamyabi se mukammal ho gaye!

lab.c6filemanagement2_open_it_create_a_f: Ise kholen, 'activity' naam ki file banaye, aur andar subjects likhein.
lab.c6filemanagement2_delete_the_folder_: Folder delete karein aur Recycle Bin se 'activity' file recover karne ki practice karein.

lab.c6grouppresentations_select_a_hardwa: Hardware topic select karein aur apni slides tayyar karein.

lab.c6grouppresentations_click_to_add_te: Text add karne ke liye click karein

lab.c6hardwarecharts_all_components_labe: Saare components sahi tarah label ho gaye hain! Shandar kaam.

lab.c6healthcampaign_write_a_catchy_slog: Ek catchy slogan ya nasihat likhein...
lab.c6hobbymonetization_choose_a_hobby_p: Ek hobby chunein, apna startup idea plan karein aur apna potential profit calculate karein.
lab.c6hobbymonetization_into_a_profitabl: mein ek profitable business mein badalta hai
lab.c6hobbymonetization_select_a_hobby_a: Pitch generate karne ke liye upar se ek hobby chunein.

lab.c6labrules_perfect_the_ict_lab_rules: Best! ICT Lab Rules chart display karne ke liye tayyar hai.

lab.c6pitchpresentation_what_specific_ag: Pakistan mein kissaan kis khaas agricultural problem ka samna kar rahe hain aaj?
lab.c6pitchpresentation_how_will_your_te: Aap ki technology (app, website, IoT) is problem ko kaise hal karegi?
lab.c6pitchpresentation_who_exactly_will: Yeh product kaun exactly istemal karega aur unhen kaise fayda hoga?
lab.c6pitchpresentation_your_presentatio: Aap ki presentation mukammal hai. Aap apna agricultural IT startup investors ko pitch karne ke liye tayyar hain!
lab.c6pitchpresentation_prepare_a_presen: Ek presentation tayyar karein jo agriculture sector mein ek problem ke liye naya IT solution pitch kare.

lab.c6postercompetition_your_group_s_pos: Aap ke group ka poster ab competition mein shaamil ho gaya hai. Yeh bada shandar lag raha hai!
lab.c6problemdecomposition_break_down_th: Main problem ("Grocery shopping kaise karein?") ko chhote, manageable sub-problems mein tod dein.
lab.c6problemdecomposition_how_to_do_gro: "Chacha ke liye grocery shopping kaise karein?"
lab.c6problemdecomposition_great_job_you: Shabash! Aap ne kamyabi se problem ko manageable steps mein decompose kiya.
lab.c6roadsafetyprocess_apply_the_6_step: 6-step problem-solving model ko sadak paar karne ke everyday scenario par apply karein.
lab.c6roadsafetyprocess_you_successfully: Aap ne kamyabi se 6-step problem-solving model apply kiya. Algorithmic soch ke zariye, aap ne safe outcome guarantee kiya.
lab.c6solarsystem_draw_planets_using_3d_: 3D shapes ka istemal karke planets banayein, colors se bharein, orbits banayein aur label karein.
lab.c6solarsystem_select_a_tool_to_start: Solar System draw karne ke liye tool chunein
lab.c6systemsoftware_identify_plug_and_p: Plug and Play (PnP) devices ki pehchaan karein aur common utility programs explore karein.
lab.c6systemsoftware_select_all_the_devi: Neeche diye gaye saare devices select karein jo "Plug and Play" hain (devices jo bagair manual configuration ke connect honey par foran kaam karte hain).
lab.c6systemsoftware_review_these_essent: Computer ko maintain aur manage karne ke liye zaroori system software utilities ka jaiza lein.
